economic_notes: Combined financial statements include operating fund, enterprise funds (rental and grocery store), housing fund, Tourisme Manawan, and Centre sportif et culturel de Manawan. Legal dispute involving wrongful dismissal claim of $466,582 outstanding. Guarantee letter issued to a supplier for $330,000.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified (opinion avec reserve) due to $1,174,973 in contributions receivable recorded in prior years that are under negotiation with funders regarding eligibility criteria - amounts recoverable cannot be determined. Financial statements are combined (not consolidated) and include operating fund, rental enterprise, housing fund, grocery store enterprise, Tourisme Manawan, and Centre sportif et culturel de Manawan. Tangible capital assets are sum of general ($40,523,234) and housing fund ($6,302,343) net book values. Annual debt service calculated as long-term debt repayment ($1,130,561) plus finance lease repayments ($133,485). Total government transfers calculated as SAC + Sante Canada + Federal Other + Provincial = 26,068,592 + 10,644,096 + 9,182,936 + 2,767,400 = 48,663,024. OSR = 53,940,289 - 48,662,024 = 5,278,265 (Autres revenues). Balance sheet figures partially obscured by OCR issues in source document.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
